title: Pilot jurisdiction ethics/compliance content + flag rules (cited, expert-reviewed)
context: The Ethics & Compliance faculty (task 012) needs jurisdiction-specific content: COI rules, open-meeting/sunshine law, public-records/FOIA, gift rules, campaign-vs-official-resource separation, and records-retention schedules for the pilot jurisdiction. All sourced from the approved source dataset (task 009), non-partisan, and signed off by a credentialed expert. This content is HIGH risk-tier; expert sign-off is a hard gate before any of it ships.
objective: Draft the pilot jurisdiction Ethics & Compliance content -- COI, open-meeting, public-records, gift, resource-separation, and records-retention rules with flag triggers -- fully cited to primary sources and reviewed and signed off by a credentialed expert before shipping.
acceptanceCriteria: Covers COI, open-meeting/sunshine, public-records/FOIA, gift rules, campaign-vs-official-resource separation, and records-retention rules for the pilot jurisdiction
Every rule and flag trigger is cited to a primary source from the approved source dataset (task 009)
Flag rules specify the conditions under which the faculty surfaces a warning
Content is non-partisan, contains no political framing, and is labeled informational not legal advice
Credentialed expert (government-ethics professional and/or licensed attorney for the jurisdiction) reviews and signs off; sign-off recorded before content ships
output: A reviewed, expert-signed-off document containing the pilot jurisdiction Ethics & Compliance content (COI, open-meeting, public-records, gift, resource-separation, records-retention) with flag rules, fully cited to primary sources.
